title: clinopodium uhligii
intro: Clinopodium uhligii, also known as East African Clinopodium, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is native to East Africa and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues and reducing fever, due to its ability to soothe the stomach and reduce inflammation. Clinopodium uhligii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various forms of consumption to harness its medicinal properties.
